title: MasterZhuyan Lesson Plan
description: Longform teaching plan that lets the locked Knowledge Model decide knowledge chapters and binds evidence, reference frames, precision anchors, deliverables, and review tasks.

teaching_positioning.description: One or two sentences describing how this lesson should help the learner think better.

learner_bottleneck.description: The learning failure the chapter sequence is built to repair: unknown definition, unclear mechanism, missing classification, weak judgment, poor recall, easy error, or missing precision.

selected_spine.description: Core teaching spine selected from the Knowledge Model, such as definition -> mechanism -> judgment -> handling -> boundary.

precision_anchors.description: Load-bearing thresholds, classifications, causes, contraindications, exceptions, formulas, criteria, and source-sensitive limits that must survive chapter drafting.

reference_frame.description: The source-grounded baseline, default rule, comparator, unit/scale, version contract, nominal condition, historical starting point, ordinary meaning, or other frame needed to interpret deviations, exceptions, thresholds, risks, grades, comparisons, or trends.

chapter_plan.description: Chapters that advance the learner's model. Delivery metadata (reading maps, source/evidence maps, safety boundaries, artifact inventories, process summaries) belongs in index.md or notes/*; include as a chapter only when it teaches a substantive reference frame or knowledge overview.

review_tasks.description: Checks to run before final merge.

delivery_note.description: Final chat note metadata only: created paths, reading order, validation state, limitations, one-sentence safety boundary when needed, and continuation. It must not carry teaching正文.

revision_reasons.description: Plan-level reasons to revise before promoting chapters or merging.

purpose.description: What this chapter lets the learner understand, remember, judge, repair, or reuse.

required_anchors.description: Reference frames, definitions, mechanisms, classifications, thresholds, causes, contraindications, exceptions, formulas, criteria, common errors, or source-sensitive limits this chapter must preserve.

completion_criteria.description: Checkable criteria against the Knowledge Model and Evidence Ledger.
